job_posting:
Data Analyst — Evergreen Data Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (Bengaluru, Karnataka; hybrid)

Evergreen Data is hiring a Data Analyst to support our analytics team. You'll build dashboards, run analyses, and partner with stakeholders to inform decisions.

Responsibilities: analyze datasets, build reports, collaborate cross-functionally.
Requirements: demonstrated experience with SQL and a BI tool; strong written and verbal communication. We evaluate candidates only on job-related competencies and provide reasonable accommodations to persons with disabilities throughout the hiring process, in line with the RPwD Act, 2016.

Salary range: ₹12,00,000-₹16,00,000 per annum plus medical insurance, provident fund, and 24 days paid leave. We are an equal-opportunity employer and welcome applicants of all genders, castes, religions, and backgrounds.
